hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$input_data = $input | Out-String; $parsed = $input_data | ConvertFrom-Json; $body = @{type='notification'; title=$parsed.title; message=$parsed.message; terminal_id=$env:MANAGER_AI_TERMINAL_ID; issue_id=$env:MANAGER_AI_ISSUE_ID; project_id=$env:MANAGER_AI_PROJECT_ID} | ConvertTo-Json; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ($env:MANAGER_AI_BASE_URL + '/api/events') -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body } catch {}"
